name: Rajiv K.
questionKey: I wanted to stock up for the wedding season, but I did not have collateral. Could I still get a loan?
outcomeKey: Rajiv qualified for a collateral-free ₹25 Lakh business loan.

name: Sunita M.
questionKey: Our loom needed upgrading, but cash flow was tight. Could we get a loan for equipment?
outcomeKey: Sunita secured a ₹15 Lakh machinery loan at a competitive rate.

name: Amit V.
questionKey: We needed working capital to hire more staff and take on bigger orders. What was the simplest way?
outcomeKey: Amit received an ₹18 Lakh working capital loan in days.
